title: Impulse — 2D Physics Engine
description: A 2D rigid-body physics engine built from scratch in TypeScript — GJK/EPA collision, a unified radius-aware narrowphase for circles, capsules and rounded polygons, conservative-advancement continuous collision (CCD) so fast bodies never tunnel, a warm-started sequential-impulse solver with split-impulse position correction, five joint types with angle/travel limits, a dynamic AABB-tree broadphase, islands & sleeping, and a 19-scene interactive playground with a live 49-check correctness suite.
